resources.title: Update of RobotWare system done
resources.desc: Update of the RobotWare system has been successful.
resources.conseqs: The RobotWare system has been updated.

resources.title: System reset
resources.desc: Loading the original system installation settings.

resources.title: System shutdown initiated
resources.desc: System shutdown is now initiated and steps are taken to stop activities and store the current state for the next startup.

resources.title: System restarted
resources.desc: System was restarted.

resources.title: No IP-address set for PROFINET
resources.desc:
The IP-address for the PROFINET internal device has not been set.
          No communication with external devices or controllers will be possible.
resources.actions: Configure an IP-address for the PROFINET internal device.

resources.title: Internal self-test completed
resources.desc: In controller cabinet 1, in drive unit at drive link position 1: An internal self-test has been completed.
resources.actions: No action is needed.

resources.title: Internal self-test completed
resources.desc: In controller cabinet 1, in drive unit at drive link position 2: An internal self-test has been completed.
resources.actions: No action is needed.

resources.title: Internal self-test completed
resources.desc: In controller cabinet 1, in drive unit at drive link position 3: An internal self-test has been completed.
resources.actions: No action is needed.

resources.title: Internal self-test completed
resources.desc: In controller cabinet 1, in drive unit at drive link position 4: An internal self-test has been completed.
resources.actions: No action is needed.

resources.title: Program pointer has been reset or removed
resources.desc: The program pointer of task SC_CBC has been reset or removed.
resources.conseqs: If the program pointer has been reset, then the program execution will start on the first instruction of the task's entry routine. If the program pointer has been removed, then the program pointer must be set to be able to start execute the program. NOTE that the manipulator may move to unexpected position when restarted!
resources.causes: The operator has probably requested this action manually by setting the program pointer, editing the program or updating positions. Loading a new program or the Exit-instruction will also reset/remove the program pointer.

resources.title: Program pointer has been reset or removed
resources.desc: The program pointer of task T_ROB1 has been reset or removed.
resources.conseqs: If the program pointer has been reset, then the program execution will start on the first instruction of the task's entry routine. If the program pointer has been removed, then the program pointer must be set to be able to start execute the program. NOTE that the manipulator may move to unexpected position when restarted!
resources.causes: The operator has probably requested this action manually by setting the program pointer, editing the program or updating positions. Loading a new program or the Exit-instruction will also reset/remove the program pointer.

resources.title: Internal self-test completed

resources.actions: No action is needed.

resources.title: Program loaded
resources.desc: A program or program module has been loaded into task T_ROB1by . After loading, 91777584 bytes memory remain. The size of the loaded program is 2840 bytes.

resources.title: Safety Controller Automatic Mode Warning
resources.desc: The active safety controller configuration has not been locked.

resources.title: Cyclic Brake Check needs to be done
resources.desc: Cyclic Brake Check (CBC) time limit expired in Safety Controller (SC) 1 or last brake check failed.
resources.conseqs: This is only a warning.
resources.actions: Check if a Brake Check needs to be performed.

resources.title: Motors Off state
resources.desc: The system is in the Motors Off state. It enters this state either after switching from Manual mode to Automatic, or after the Motors On circuit has been opened during program execution.
resources.conseqs: No operation will be possible until after closing the Motors On circuit. The manipulator's axes are meanwhile held in position by mechanical holding brakes.

resources.title: Automatic mode confirmed
resources.desc: The system is in the Automatic mode.
resources.conseqs: The enabling device is disconnected. The robot can move without human intervention.

resources.title: Enabling device active in Auto mode

resources.conseqs: The Enabling device is ignored in Automatic operating mode.
resources.actions: Release the Enabling device.

resources.title: Motors On state
resources.desc: The system is in the Motors On state.

resources.title: Enabling device active in Auto mode

resources.title: Safety guard stop state
resources.desc: The system is in the Guard stop state. It enters this state either after switching from Automatic- to Manual mode, or after the Motors On circuit has been opened by an Emergency Stop or Automatic Stop, or in Manual mode if Enabling device was released.
resources.conseqs: No operation will be possible until after closing the Motors On circuit. The manipulator's axes are meanwhile held in position by mechanical holding brakes.
resources.causes: Any safety device connected to the system's stop inputs have been opened. These are shown in the Circuit Diagram.
resources.actions: Check which safety device caused the stop.

resources.title: Motors Off state
resources.desc: The system is in the Motors Off state. It enters this state either after switching from Manual mode to Automatic, or after the Motors On circuit has been opened during program execution.
resources.conseqs: No operation will be possible until after closing the Motors On circuit. The manipulator's axes are meanwhile held in position by mechanical holding brakes.

resources.title: Manual mode selected
resources.desc: The system is in the Manual mode.
resources.conseqs: Programmed operation is possible, but only with a max. speed of 250 mm/s. The manipulator may also be jogged manually after pressing the enabling device on the FlexPendant.

resources.title: Safety guard stop state
resources.desc: The system is in the Guard stop state. It enters this state either after switching from Automatic- to Manual mode, or after the Motors On circuit has been opened by an Emergency Stop or Automatic Stop, or in Manual mode if Enabling device was released.

resources.title: Start in Motors Off
resources.desc: It is only Joint Unit Replacement in service routine TorqueSensCalib that shall be started in Motors Off.
resources.conseqs: It will only be possible to run logic instructions. Move instructions will not be possible to execute while in Motors Off state.
resources.actions: Consider to start the program in Motors On state.

resources.title: Integrated Vision not installed
resources.desc: The option Integrated Vision is not installed on this system.
resources.conseqs: No communication with the camera is possible.
resources.causes: The Integrated Vision functionality have been used or configured without the Integrated Vision option installed.
resources.actions: If the Integrated Vision option is needed: configure a new system with this option, and install the system.

resources.title: Motors On contactor activation error
resources.desc: Motors On contactor 1 in drive module 1 failed to close when ordered.
resources.conseqs: The mechanical unit cannot be run manually or automatically.
resources.actions: Warning: Further use of robot is not permitted until the fault is found and eliminated.To resume normal operation, first acknowledge the error, then release the enabling device and press it again after approx. one second.

resources.title: Motors On contactor activation error
resources.desc: Motors On contactor 1 in drive module 1 failed to close when ordered.
resources.conseqs: The mechanical unit cannot be run manually or automatically.
resources.actions: Warning: Further use of robot is not permitted until the fault is found and eliminated.To resume normal operation, first acknowledge the error, then release the enabling device and press it again after approx. one second.

resources.title: Not possible to open the UdpUc device
resources.desc: It was not possible to open the external device MetaMoveUC that was specified in the RAPID instruction EGMSetupUC.
resources.conseqs: The program execution is stopped immediately.
resources.actions: Check if:The device name is spelled correctly.

resources.title: Execution error
resources.desc: The execution of task T_ROB1 has been stopped by a runtime error.
resources.conseqs: The program execution is immediately halted.

resources.title: Short movements
resources.desc: One or more consecutive move instructions resulted in movements close to zero length.Task: T_ROB1.Program ref. /MetaMoveCore/main/MoveAbsJ/58.
resources.conseqs: Programming with multiple close to zero length movements in a robot program can lead to high CPU load which can make zones to be converted into finepoints (event message 50024).Very close programmed points can also lead to non-smooth robot motion.
resources.causes: Multiple move instructions with the same programmed position or subsequent move instructions with short distance between programmed positions.
resources.actions: Increase the distance between the programmed positions.Remove redundant intermediate programmed positions.If the behavior of the robot and the system is ok, the sensitivity of this event message can be adjusted by using the system parameter 'Max allowed short segments' in topic Motion and type Motion Planner.

resources.title: Short movements
resources.desc: One or more consecutive move instructions resulted in movements close to zero length.Task: T_ROB1.Program ref. /MetaMoveCore/main/MoveAbsJ/59.
resources.conseqs: Programming with multiple close to zero length movements in a robot program can lead to high CPU load which can make zones to be converted into finepoints (event message 50024).Very close programmed points can also lead to non-smooth robot motion.
resources.causes: Multiple move instructions with the same programmed position or subsequent move instructions with short distance between programmed positions.
resources.actions: Increase the distance between the programmed positions.Remove redundant intermediate programmed positions.If the behavior of the robot and the system is ok, the sensitivity of this event message can be adjusted by using the system parameter 'Max allowed short segments' in topic Motion and type Motion Planner.

resources.title: Close to singularity while External Motion Interface active
resources.desc: The robot in External Motion Interface correction 0 is too close to a singularity.
resources.conseqs: The program execution is stopped, and the system goes to Motors Off state.
resources.causes: The robot is close to a singularity, or too small numerical tolerance have been specified in the system parameters.
resources.actions: Avoid moving too close to the singularity.

resources.title: Close to singularity while External Motion Interface active
resources.desc: The robot in External Motion Interface correction 0 is too close to a singularity.
resources.conseqs: The program execution is stopped, and the system goes to Motors Off state.
resources.causes: The robot is close to a singularity, or too small numerical tolerance have been specified in the system parameters.
resources.actions: Avoid moving too close to the singularity.

resources.title: Short movements

resources.conseqs: Programming with multiple close to zero length movements in a robot program can lead to high CPU load which can make zones to be converted into finepoints (event message 50024).Very close programmed points can also lead to non-smooth robot motion.
resources.causes: Multiple move instructions with the same programmed position or subsequent move instructions with short distance between programmed positions.
resources.actions: Increase the distance between the programmed positions.Remove redundant intermediate programmed positions.If the behavior of the robot and the system is ok, the sensitivity of this event message can be adjusted by using the system parameter 'Max allowed short segments' in topic Motion and type Motion Planner.

resources.title: Jog direction time-out
resources.desc: Teach pendant, or other jogging client, was not able to deliver the jog direction to the Robot Controller in a timely manner.
resources.conseqs: Robot motion is stopped.
resources.actions: Retry jogging.

resources.actions: Modify the program so that all speeds are inside the configured limits.

resources.conseqs: The Enabling device is ignored in Automatic operating mode.
resources.actions: Release the Enabling device.

resources.title: Safety Controller Tool Speed violation
resources.desc: Tool Speed supervision Gesamtzone_TSP was violated in the safety controller for drive module 1. The cause was 1.
resources.conseqs: If configured with a stop action, the safety controller will stop all robot movements.
resources.actions: Modify the program so that all speeds are inside the configured limits.

resources.title: Enabling device active in Auto mode
resources.desc: The system has detected that the Enabling device has been pressed in Automatic operating mode.
resources.conseqs: The Enabling device is ignored in Automatic operating mode.
resources.actions: Release the Enabling device.

resources.title: Safety Controller Servo-Lag Limit exceeded
resources.desc: The safety controller for drive module 1 has detected a too big difference between the ordered and actual position on axis 6.
resources.conseqs: The safety controller will stop all robot movements.

resources.title: Enabling device active in Auto mode
resources.desc: The system has detected that the Enabling device has been pressed in Automatic operating mode.
resources.conseqs: The Enabling device is ignored in Automatic operating mode.
resources.actions: Release the Enabling device.

resources.title: Internal self-test completed
resources.desc: In controller cabinet 1, in drive unit at drive link position 1: An internal self-test has been completed.
resources.actions: No action is needed.

resources.title: Cyclic Brake Check needs to be done
resources.desc: Cyclic Brake Check (CBC) time limit expired in Safety Controller (SC) 1 or last brake check failed.
resources.conseqs: This is only a warning.
resources.actions: Check if a Brake Check needs to be performed.

resources.title: Enabling device active in Auto mode
resources.desc: The system has detected that the Enabling device has been pressed in Automatic operating mode.

resources.actions: Release the Enabling device.

resources.title: Safety Controller Automatic Mode Warning
resources.desc: The active safety controller configuration has not been locked.
